character_dossiers.name: the stranger
character_dossiers.biography: A man who lingers near the inn door, interacts with the narrator, and confronts the captain. Described as having a tallowy face and a cutlass.

character_dossiers.name: Black Dog
character_dossiers.biography: A man with two missing talons who arrives at the inn and engages in a confrontation with the captain. Refers to himself as Black Dog.

character_dossiers.name: the captain
character_dossiers.biography: A man who fights with Black Dog, sustains a wound, and later reeling from alcohol. Referred to as 'Bill' by Black Dog.

character_dossiers.name: Bill
character_dossiers.biography: The captain's name, referred to by Black Dog. Identified as the same individual as the captain.

character_dossiers.name: Jim
character_dossiers.biography: The first-person narrator who observes interactions at the inn, fetches rum, and witnesses the captain's altercation.
